raw_response: The calculation provided by Agents shows that the correct application of the z-score method yields \( X = 10.6 + (-1.645)(2) \approx 7.31 \). Rounding conventionally to two decimal places brings us close to option A (7.32), yet based on the original problem statement asking for "minimum" and ensuring inclusivity of all individuals just above the threshold, I would argue for including the rounded-down value closer to the calculated result rather than rounding up unnecessarily. Therefore, my preference leans towards:
